case_title: CITY BANK N.A. VS. CYNTHIA KEARNEY

docket_entries.description: EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY BANK N.A. AS TO DEFENDANT KEARNEY, CYNTHIA SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  DEC-11-2017
